required_preferences.fact: Attends in-person family dinners and outings with parents weekly during their summer in Chicago — replaces regular Saturday morning phone check-ins with shared activities

supersedes.fact: Schedules family check-ins every Saturday morning — never skips unless traveling for business

required_preferences.fact: Chats and spends time with his partner in-person most weekdays after work, rarely schedules video calls now that they cohabitate

supersedes.fact: Only video-chats with his partner at designated times — won't take calls during work hours or meetings

required_preferences.fact: Uses a crisis management digital dashboard to coordinate all cross-functional communications and track real-time updates, suspending his usual reliance on email chains for task tracking
Schedules weekly video calls with his partner and family to stay connected during his temporary relocation
Declines late-evening social invitations during the workweek to allow a consistent bedtime routine and uninterrupted CPAP use
Watches climbing documentaries and livestreams online to stay connected to the sport during injury recovery

persona: A 28-year-old marketing manager at a multinational corporation
